title: Secret Routes Mod
description: Dungeon Secret Route Waypoints for Hypixel Skyblock
body:
# Secret Routes
Your new favourite dungeon secret mod.

Discord: [https://discord.gg/qmtQmz4V3X](https://discord.gg/qmtQmz4V3X)

## List of Features:

### Secret Routes Waypoints
  - Some of the best secret routes out on the internet (recorded by zyra in the discord)
  - Tracking line made by particles or OpenGL Render lines
  - AOTV waypoints
  - Interact waypoints
  - Superboom waypoints
  - Stonk waypoints
  - Ender pearl waypoints/ Pearl launch angle lines
  - All secrets

 
### Custom routes
  - Ability to Semi-Automatically record custom routes to use
  - Importing/loading custom routes 


### Customizability
  - Recolor every single OpenGL rendring item
  - Toggle on/off all waypoints
  - Recolor all text boxes
  - Toggle on/off all text boxes
  - Swap between any particle in 1.8.9, openGl or no line
  - Save and load different custom profiles


### Interface
  - A beautiful OneConfig interface with different tabs to keep everything organized


### QOL
  - HUD for recording
  - Auto Inform new updates (Toggleable)
  - Auto download new updates (Toggleable)
